title: Atlassian slashes 10% of workforce to 'self-fund' investments in AI
description: Atlassian said it's cutting 10% of its workforce, or about 1,600 jobs, as it restructures to fund investments in artificial intelligence and enterprise sales.
content:
Atlassian said on Wednesday that it's eliminating 10% of its workforce, or about 1,600 jobs, as the company restructures following a plunge in its stock price driven by developments in artificial intelligence.

title: Major Australian company slashes 1,600 jobs as AI takeover hits workforce
description: Atlassian billionaire Mike Cannon-Brookes has slashed more than 1,600 jobs as artificial intelligence reshapes the workforce.
content:
Atlassian billionaire Mike Cannon-Brookes has slashed more than 1,600 jobs as artificial intelligence reshapes the workforce.
Cannon-Brookes said AI had impacted 'the mix of skills we need' and 'the number of roles required in certain areas.'

title: What Is OpenClaw? AI Marvel or Cybersecurity Nightmare
description: People have flocked to the OpenClaw artificial intelligence agent since it was launched in November by Austrian programmer Peter Steinberger. The digital assistant can use your computer to handle complex tasks that previously only a human could undertake, such as making travel bookings, prioritizing emails and drafting replies, surveying product catalogs and emailing vendors.

content:
March 11 (Reuters) - Software provider Atlassian said on Wednesday it would lay off around 10% of its workforce, or roughly 1,600 positions, as part of a restructuring plan to push into artificial intelligence and enterprise sales.

title: Microsoft urges Pentagon to pause blacklisting Anthropic
description: Microsoft has warned a judge that the Pentagon blacklisting of Anthropic could hamper U.S. warfighters and imperil the country's drive to lead in artificial intelligence. title: Tumbler Ridge MP backs mother's lawsuit against OpenAI, blaming it for shooting role

title: These fixed-income assets can provide some cushion from AI-driven market swings
description: Asset-backed securities could provide investors some protection as artificial intelligence disruption fears shake up the market.
content: Investors who want to protect against artificial intelligence disruption may want to consider securitized products, including asset-backed securities, according to Nuveen's Nicholas Travaglino. AI fears, along with rising oil prices and the Iran war ... [4622 chars]
